workflowcustomfield.label: [SS] VB Amt Less Than PO Amt
[SS] VB Amt Greater Than PO Amt
[SS] VB Qty Less Than PO Qty
[SS] VB Qty Greater Than PO Qty

showmessageaction.messagetext: Non-PO Bills need either a Blue Collar Project or a Department at the header wf411

initcondition.formula: isEmpty("Created From") = 'T' AND isEmpty("Department (Main)") = 'T' AND isEmpty("Blue Collar Project") = 'T'

returnusererroraction.errortext: non-po bills need either the bcp or department at header populated

initcondition.formula: isEmpty("Created From") = 'T' AND isEmpty("Department (Main)") = 'T' AND isEmpty("Blue Collar Project") = 'T'

parametersetting.valuetext: Discrepancy between Terms on Bill and PO

initcondition.formula: isChecked("Workflow:[SS] VB-PO: Location") = 'T' AND "Workflow:[3WAY] Location Feature Status" = 1

parametersetting.valuetext: Discrepancy between Location on Bill and PO
No matching PO can be found for the Vendor Bill
Difference of Quantity on Bill and Item Receipt Greater than 10%

sendemailaction.body:
<br>You have a new Vendor Bill {transactionnumber}  to review and approve. <br>

Kindly log in to your NetSuite account at http://www.netsuite.com
sendemailaction.subject: Vendor Bill {transactionnumber} for Approval

sendemailaction.body:
<br>You have a new Vendor Bill {transactionnumber}  to review and approve. <br>

Kindly log in to your NetSuite account at http://www.netsuite.com
sendemailaction.subject: Vendor Bill {transactionnumber} for Approval

initcondition.formula: "Old Record:Next Approver" NOT IN ("Next Approver") AND isEmpty("Next Approver:E-mail") = 'F'
"Bill Exception Reason" IN (" Bill Exception Reason List1"," Bill Exception Reason List2")

sendemailaction.body: <br>The Vendor Bill {transactionnumber} has been rejected by {nextapprover}.<br> To view the Vendor Bill, kindly log in to your NetSuite account at http://www.netsuite.com.
sendemailaction.subject: Your Vendor Bill {transactionnumber} is Rejected

sendemailaction.body: <br>The Vendor Bill {transactionnumber} has been approved by {nextapprover}.<br>To view the Vendor Bill, kindly log in to your NetSuite account at http://www.netsuite.com.
sendemailaction.subject: Your Vendor Bill {transactionnumber} is Approved

initcondition.formula: isChecked("Workflow:[3WAY] Exception Status") = 'T' AND isEmpty("Workflow:[3WAY] Bill Creator:E-mail") = 'F'
